lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Asp Scout ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Asp Scout
sources.what: Stock hull stats, hardpoint/internal layout, and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Asp Scout
sources.what: Manufacturer, role assessment, and lore reference for the Asp Scout.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Asp Scout's hull and handling, framing it against the larger Asp Explorer.
